zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Herling於1346年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可易亞斯特 哈林時，他的父親John De Herle I49歲，母親Margaret de Weyland50歲。他於1371年與Margaret Gyney在英國英格蘭諾福爾可結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1403年7月1日在英國英格蘭諾福爾可特福德享年57歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Herling
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name from any of the places called Herlingen (Saar) or Herrlingen (near Ulm).
South German: from Old High German herling ‘left over, unripe grapes (after the harvest)’, a nickname for an immature person.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): artificial name from German Herling ‘unripe grapes’.

variants.name: Herlong
meanings: Perhaps an altered form of German   Herling  . This surname is found mainly in SC.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Herling was born in 1346, in East Harling, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, John De Herle I, was 49 and his mother, Margaret de Weyland, was 50. He married Margaret Gyney in 1371, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 1 July 1403, in Thetford, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Herling est né en 1346, à East Harling, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John De Herle I, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Weyland, avait 50 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Gyney en 1371, à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 1 juillet 1403, à Thetford, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Herling 1346 in East Harling, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John De Herle I 49 und seine Mutter Margaret de Weyland 50. Er hat 1371 in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Margaret Gyney geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 1. Juli 1403 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Thetford, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Herling è nato il nel 1346 nel East Harling, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John De Herle I, aveva 49 anni e il suo madre, Margaret de Weyland, aveva 50 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Gyney nel 1371, nel Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: John de Herlingが1346年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクエアスト ハーリングで生まれた時，父John De Herle Iは49歳，母Margaret de Weylandは50歳であった。1371年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクでMargaret Gyneyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1403年7月1日にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクスエトフォードで57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Herling(이)가 1346년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 이스트 하를링에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John De Herle I(은)는 49세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Weyland(은)는 50세였다. 그는 1371년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 Margaret Gyney(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1403년 7월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 테트퍼드에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Herling nasceu em 1346, em East Harling, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John De Herle I, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Weyland, tinha 50 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Gyney em 1371, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Herling родился в 1346 г. в местности эаст харлинг, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John De Herle I было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Weyland, 50. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Gyney в 1371 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 1 июля 1403 г. в местности тетфорд, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 57 лет.
